name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate bill collection and summarization instead of manual spreadsheets and email tracking.
problem_solved: manual tracking and summarizing of utility bills
